testCases.title: Valid prompt identity persists contracts and routes from prompt-local refs
testCases.expectedBehavior: A valid promptId, promptHash, sessionId, and runtime pass continuity and allow router dereference from stored approved contracts.

testCases.title: Stale prompt hash fails continuity
testCases.expectedBehavior: A stale promptHash blocks semantic gate persistence and reports prompt continuity failure.

testCases.title: SemanticIntentContract without approved nouns is invalid
testCases.expectedBehavior: The semantic contract validator reports approvedNouns as a blocking issue.

testCases.title: DigitalTwinChangeContract without evaluationPlan is invalid
testCases.expectedBehavior: The Digital Twin contract validator reports evaluationPlan as a blocking issue.

testCases.title: Raw cross-cutting ontology mutation cannot route
testCases.expectedBehavior: pm_intent_router returns contract_required before dispatching cross-cutting ontology-affecting work.

testCases.title: ProjectScope lane refs influence routing validation ladder
testCases.expectedBehavior: Approved lane refs project required validation packs into the routing projection.

testCases.title: Selective-blocking default skips non-ontology mutating work
testCases.expectedBehavior: The default Prompt-DTC gate mode remains selective-blocking and skips non-ontology mutating edits without denial.

testCases.title: Scoped blocking denies protected surfaces without DTC approval
testCases.expectedBehavior: scoped-blocking denies protected lead-intent surfaces without digital_twin_approved continuity.

testCases.title: Full blocking denies all mutating surfaces without DTC approval
testCases.expectedBehavior: blocking denies ordinary mutating edits when no approved DTC exists.

testCases.title: Approved prompt-local contracts allow mutation in blocking mode
testCases.expectedBehavior: blocking mode passes once prompt-local SemanticIntentContract and DigitalTwinChangeContract records are approved and continuous.
